## Safety And Data Boundary

- [ ] No API keys, AWS credentials, SSO cache files, `.env` files, or other secrets are included.
- [ ] No real client data, private site records, private planning documents, or access-controlled material are included.
- [ ] No personal strategy, private messages, or local war-room coordination content is included.
- [ ] The change does not claim certified RAMS, emergency guidance, work approval, legal advice, or competent-person replacement.
- [ ] Real, cached, mocked, fallback, and future components remain clearly labelled where relevant.
